# Vigorant

> Healthcare marketing agency specializing in AI-driven patient acquisition for dental, medical, and chiropractic practices through SEO, paid ads, and conversion-optimized websites.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Vigorant's healthcare marketing services, growth engine framework, case studies, and client testimonials.
- [For Practices](/for-practices): Pain-point hub for dental, medical, and chiropractic practices struggling with visibility, marketing ROI, lead conversion, reputation, and scalable patient growth.
